hero.headline: Quality Assurance Engineer
hero.subtext: I hunt bugs, automate workflows, and validate APIs to deliver flawless digital experiences.

about.philosophy: Quality is not just a phase. It is a continuous practice woven into design, development, and deployment.
about.introduction: Passionate QA engineer with 5+ years of experience in software testing and quality assurance. I believe in proactive testing strategies that prevent defects rather than just finding them. My approach combines meticulous attention to detail with efficient automation to ensure reliable, high-quality software delivery.
about.focus: Python, Selenium, API testing, CI/CD integration

projects.title: E-commerce Test Automation Framework
projects.description: Built a maintainable automation framework for a global e-commerce platform with data-driven suites, reusable components, and Jenkins-based CI.
projects.role: Lead QA Engineer – framework author, integration owner, performance tuning
projects.impact: Cut regression cycle from 12h to 3h; reduced production incidents by 45%.

projects.title: API Testing Suite
projects.description: Engineered API contract and regression suite for REST and GraphQL endpoints with automated schema validation and performance baselining.
projects.role: API test architect, CI pipeline manager
projects.impact: Improved API stability by 52% and reduced manual testing effort by 70%.

projects.title: Performance Testing Dashboard
projects.description: Created real-time load test reporting dashboards using JMeter, Grafana, and InfluxDB for rapid performance regression detection.
projects.impact: Detected and resolved top 3 latency bottlenecks, improving 95th percentile response in production by 32%.

projects.title: Mobile App Testing Framework
projects.description: Built a cross-platform Appium framework for iOS/Android with visual validation and network stubbing for agile releases.
projects.impact: Increased cross-device coverage by 85% and reduced mobile release regressions by 55%.
